new_claims.claim_text: Germany is attempting to block people from buying homes based on their right-wing views, framing it as a social credit score and Marxism tyranny.
new_claims.notes: Claim about political control and potential abuse of power.

new_claims.claim_text: President Trump has repeatedly promised pardons to his top administration officials before leaving office, according to the Wall Street Journal.
new_claims.notes: Suggests a potential for circumventing accountability.
Conflicting with other reports and web search. Refuted by web search.

new_claims.claim_text: Rep. Eric Swalwell was accused of sexual assault by a former staffer.
new_claims.notes: Allegation related to accountability for public figures.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran attacked Kuwaiti oil tanker Al-Salmi in Dubai.
new_claims.notes: Specific incident claim. Requires verification — significant escalation if true.

updated_claims.notes: Web search (Reuters, Bloomberg, MarineTraffic) indicates continued passage of commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, contradicting Iranian claims of closure.
